backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Lead and UserProfile types, with endpoints for submitting/deleting/querying leads and user profiles, protected by an AccessControl mixin that restricts admin-only operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: replacing the company name with 'TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION)' and updating the slogan to 'Empowering Odisha with Clean Energy' across specified frontend files.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one- to two-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, theme, and key changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes, including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app with the page title set to 'TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION)' and a root div mounting the main.tsx module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps all page sections (Header, Hero, SchemeInfo, etc.) in a LanguageProvider context and renders the full single-page layout.
frontend/src/components/BankFinanceBanne: Dark navy banner section displaying bank finance stats (loan percentage, customer payment, tenure) from translation keys and a WhatsApp CTA button.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed floating WhatsApp button component using the correct `t.floating.tooltip` translation key, with a pulse ring animation and hover tooltip.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Two-column footer displaying the brand name, `brandSub` unit designation, and 'Empowering Odisha with Clean Energy' tagline from translations, alongside contact details and a WhatsApp link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll nav links, a language switcher (EN/HI/OD), a WhatsApp CTA button, and a mobile hamburger menu that reacts to scroll position.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, tagline, WhatsApp and scheme CTA buttons, and three trust-stat cards.
frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.tsx: Lead capture form that validates user inputs (name, phone, city, system size), submits the lead via a React Query mutation, and opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message on success.
frontend/src/components/OdishaGuide.tsx: Section displaying Odisha-specific solar subsidy tiers (1kW, 2kW, 3kW) with central and state subsidy breakdowns, animated into view via IntersectionObserver.
frontend/src/components/SchemeInfo.tsx: Detailed PM Surya Ghar scheme information section covering benefits, eligibility, and a four-phase step-by-step application process, plus a 'Why Choose Us' block.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Two-card services section showcasing residential and commercial solar offerings with feature lists and inquiry CTA buttons that scroll to the inquiry form.
frontend/src/components/WarrantyGuarante: Renders a three-card warranty section with navy/gold/teal accent styles, displaying years, title, and description for each warranty tier using i18n translations.
Displays a styled CTA section with a WhatsApp link, phone number, and decorative elements, directing users to contact via WhatsApp using a hardcoded number.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Renders a three-card 'Why Choose Us' section with navy/gold/teal accents, each card showing an icon, title, and description sourced from i18n translations.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for managing the active language ('en', 'hi', 'od'), persisting the selection to localStorage and exposing a setter via the useLanguage hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication hook and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitLead mutation hook that submits lead form data to the ICP backend actor and invalidates the leads query cache on success.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Contains the full multi-language translation strings (English, Hindi, Odia) for all UI sections including hero, scheme info, warranty, and more.
frontend/src/i18n/useTranslation.ts: A hook that returns the translation object for the currently active language by combining useLanguage and the translations map.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using oklch colors, and declares keyframe animations (shimmer, pulse-ring, fade-in-up, accordion).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom navy/gold/teal color palettes using oklch, custom fonts (Outfit, Playfair Display), box shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, existing features, and pending feature requests for the TRI-GITA SERVICES PM Surya Ghar portal presentation, including company name and slogan update tasks.
